_fasta_comment: Optional. Omit to use the ~/.oligomcp/genomes/ cache (auto-downloaded).
_api_key_comment: Set $ALPHAGENOME_API_KEY env var or run `oligomcp set-api-key`.
_resize_comment: Optional: manually specify resize_width (16384, 131072, 524288, or 1048576). If omitted, auto-selected based on gene length
